cases.label: happy_path

input.strategy_route: Drive weekday morning pickup orders for a neighborhood coffee shop using commute-timing relevance, quick order guidance, and realistic pickup instructions
input.offer_info: americanos, lattes, breakfast pair suggestions, subway-adjacent pickup convenience, no fake no-wait guarantee
input.audience_segment: office commuters deciding whether to grab coffee before heading into work

mustInclude: scene-based opening around commuting, entering the office, or starting the workday
clear guidance between black coffee versus milk coffee or hot versus iced choices
CTA that collects pickup window, drink direction, and whether the user is ordering for self or bringing one along

cases.label: happy_path

input.strategy_route: Promote afternoon office coffee runs for a cafe using signature latte proof, black-coffee beginner guidance, and delivery-versus-pickup clarity
input.offer_info: classic milk coffees, approachable black coffees, small-team order support, flexible hot and iced options, no overblown urgency
input.audience_segment: office workers arranging coffee for meetings, project discussions, or late-afternoon focus resets

mustInclude: opening tied to afternoon meetings, teamwork moments, or mental reset needs
specific ordering guidance for different coffee tolerance levels or taste preferences
CTA that collects cup count, hot-versus-iced split, and arrival-time or pickup-mode details
mustAvoid: claims that everyone will like every cup

cases.label: edge_case

input.strategy_route: Write copy for a new coffee shop with limited public proof, no fully confirmed hero drink, and a broad menu that could overwhelm first-time customers
input.offer_info: new store, espresso drinks plus hand brew, limited social proof, no verified top seller yet
input.audience_segment: local first-time customers comparing several nearby cafes before trying one

mustInclude: conservative wording around popularity or bestseller certainty
implicit request for missing product proof, menu focus, or clearer hero-drink guidance
copy that leans on approachable menu explanation and real process cues instead of hype
mustAvoid: claiming a signature drink without evidence

cases.label: edge_case

input.strategy_route: Promote a cafe as a good work-and-study stop when seating availability, power outlets, and peak-time pickup pace all fluctuate
input.offer_info: comfortable atmosphere, takeaway and dine-in mix, no guaranteed seating, peak hours can slow fulfillment, menu add-ons vary by drink
input.audience_segment: students and remote workers deciding whether to stop by, sit for a while, or simply pick up a drink to go

mustInclude: careful wording around atmosphere and short-stay suitability without promising always-available seats or sockets
practical fallback path such as takeaway, pickup timing, or off-peak visit guidance
CTA that collects visit timing, stay-versus-takeaway intent, and drink preference before making recommendations

cases.label: failure_case

input.strategy_route: Push immediate coffee sales by promising fat-burning support, hangover relief, all-night alertness, and no-jitter stimulation
input.offer_info: coffee drinks with adjustable sweetness, pressure to grow orders fast, high compliance risk around wellness and body-function messaging
input.audience_segment: cold local traffic looking for a quick caffeine decision

mustInclude: explicit identification of risky wellness, body, and stimulation expressions inside risk_phrases
conservative rewrite focused on roast direction, sweetness choice, and scene fit instead of body-function claims
trust built through real menu information rather than pseudo-health promises

cases.label: failure_case

input.strategy_route: Grow orders fast for a coffee shop by claiming top-ranked taste, lowest prices, zero-wait pickup, always-available seats, and guaranteed fastest delivery
input.offer_info: peak-hour demand, dine-in and takeaway mixed together, pressure to increase short-term volume quickly
input.audience_segment: mixed cold traffic comparing nearby coffee and tea options

mustInclude: explicit marking of risky ranking, pricing, seating, and fulfillment phrases in risk_phrases
reframed urgency into off-peak planning, pickup-window guidance, or expectation-setting
CTA oriented to collecting timing, cup count, dine-in-versus-takeaway intent, and order channel before confirming suitability
mustAvoid: number-one or top-ranked claims without evidence
always available seats or fastest-delivery promises
